generated_oml:
instance TemperatureSensor_DS18S20 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer sensor for temperature measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureData_DS18S20
]

instance TemperatureData_DS18S20 : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor_DS18S20
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data from DS18S20 sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureData_DS18S20
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Scipy, RabbitMQ
]

instance GeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD representations of physical components for geometric accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Scipy
]

instance AnalyticalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Differential equations modeling dynamic thermal behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Scipy
]

instance RabbitMQ : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server for synchronization and communication between system components"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService, SimulationService, FaultDetectionService, StateEstimationService, OptimizationService, SupervisoryControllerService
]

instance Scipy : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy package for optimization functions during model calibration"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Monitoring services to assess safety and optimal performance using real-time sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyInsight, PerformanceInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation capabilities to reproduce and predict physical twin behavior under current operating conditions"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictionInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization algorithms for system efficiency"
    DTDFVocab:provides EfficiencyInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection mechanisms for system health monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultInsight
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "State estimation techniques for system state inference"
    DTDFVocab:provides StateEstimationInsight
]

instance SupervisoryControllerService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Supervisory controllers to adjust physical operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustmentAction
]

instance SafetyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time safety assessment based on temperature and system parameters"
]

instance PerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal performance metrics derived from sensor data"
]

instance PredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted behavior of physical twin under current conditions"
]

instance EfficiencyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "System efficiency optimization recommendations"
]

instance FaultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected faults in the thermal incubator system"
]

instance StateEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated current state of the system using sensor data"
]

instance AdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated or manual adjustments to physical components based on insights"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Raspberry Pi controller subscribes to RabbitMQ messages for fan and heatbed control commands, processes them, and transmits validated commands through the communication server to actuate physical components, with confirmation mechanisms ensuring accurate execution."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system utilizes RabbitMQ as a central message broker for synchronization and communication, with the Controller listening for commands via RabbitMQ and the Low-level driver interfacing with sensors through a 1-Wire bus. Two distinct simulation models (Model A and Model B) are employed for calibration and prediction purposes but operate independently without data exchange."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms update model parameters based on sensor data to maintain fidelity, while monitoring systems check operational safety and optimality; detected violations trigger corrective actions by humans or automated algorithms."
]
